## рҹҢҹ бҙҖКҷбҙҸбҙңбҙӣ

Enjoy lag-free playback, premium buttons, crystal-clear audio, beautiful interface, and powerful group management features.

> вңҰ бҙҳбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮКҖбҙҮбҙ… КҷКҸ В» [@II_NOBITA_X_PRIME_II](https://t.me/II_NOBITA_X_PRIME_II)

## рҹҺө бҙҚбҙңsЙӘбҙ„ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙ…s

```
/play     вҖ” Play audio from YouTube / by name
/vplay    вҖ” Play video in voice chat
/stream   вҖ” Stream from a live URL
/pause    вҖ” Pause current track
/resume   вҖ” Resume paused track
/skip     вҖ” Skip to next track
/stop     вҖ” Stop streaming & clear queue
/queue    вҖ” View current queue
/shuffle  вҖ” Shuffle the queue
/loop     вҖ” Loop current track / full queue
/volume   вҖ” Adjust volume (1вҖ“200)
/seek     вҖ” Seek to a position in track
/end      вҖ” End voice chat
```

## рҹҡҖ бҙ…бҙҮбҙҳКҹбҙҸКҸ

### Requirements
- Python 3.10+
- MongoDB URI
- Telegram Bot Token
- Telegram API ID & API Hash
- String Session (Pyrogram)

### Quick Deploy

```bash
# Clone
git clone https://github.com/dhruvkumarray3-eng/DHRUV_X_RADHA
cd DHRUV_X_RADHA

# Install dependencies
pip3 install -r requirements.txt

# Configure .env (see below)
cp sample.env .env
nano .env

# Run
python3 -m SHUKLAMUSIC
```

### Environment Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `BOT_TOKEN` | Your Telegram Bot Token from @BotFather |
| `MONGO_DB_URI` | MongoDB connection string |
| `STRING_SESSION` | Pyrogram String Session for assistant |
| `API_ID` | Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org |
| `API_HASH` | Telegram API Hash from my.telegram.org |
| `OWNER_ID` | Your Telegram User ID |
| `LOGGER_ID` | Log group/channel ID |
| `SUPPORT_CHAT` | Support group link |
